name: Sopa De Albondigas
recipeIngredient: 6 Cilantro sprigs, chopped (including stems and leaves)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the chayote by cutting it into thin strips.
2. Make the meatballs: Combine all meatball ingredients and shape them into 3/4-inch meatballs.
3. Bring the beef broth to a low simmer in a large pot.
4. Add the julienned vegetables (chayote, carrots, leek) to the simmering broth.
5. Gently add the meatballs to the pot, ensuring they are submerged in the liquid.
6. Cover and let it simmer over low heat for 30 minutes.
7. Serve hot in bowls with tortillas.
Note: Making your own beef broth enhances this recipe's flavor significantly, especially given its reliance on a strong broth. This dish is inspired by "False Tongues and Sunday Bread" by Copeland Marks.
